name: thread-memory
description: Durable project-state memory for AI coding agents, with one-command installation for Codex, Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and OpenCode.

interface.shortDescription: Persist project state for AI coding agents
interface.longDescription: Thread Memory gives coding agents a durable README per thread or workspace, so they can read and update the project state that matters: objectives, decisions, files, verification commands, risks, progress, next steps, and open questions. It complements host context management instead of replacing it.
defaultPrompt: Use Thread Memory for this session.
Resume this project with durable context.
